allow: Bash(# Search DataSF catalog for current building permits and pipeline dataset IDs curl -s ""https://data.sfgov.org/api/catalog/v1?q=building+permits&limit=5"" | python3 -c "" import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) for r in d.get\(''results'',[]\): m=r.get\(''metadata'',{}\) print\(r.get\(''link'',''''\), m.get\(''name'',''''\), r.get\(''id'',''''\)\) "")

Bash(# Try a sample row from the permits dataset to see what fields exist curl -s ""https://data.sfgov.org/resource/i98e-djp9.json?\\$limit=1&supervisor_district=3"" | python3 -c ""import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d[0], indent=2\)\)"")

Bash(# Get the full Granicus page and extract all dates and clip IDs curl -s ""https://sanfrancisco.granicus.com/ViewPublisher.php?view_id=91"" 2>&1 # Extract all dates echo ""=== ALL MEETING DATES ==="" grep -oP ''\\d{2}/\\d{2}/\\d{2}'' /tmp/granicus_rpk.html)
Bash(Commission, '...'"\). Clears need for cache tables to be refreshed.:*)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_-Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }")
